div.head: Sir F. Bruce to Mr. Seward
div.p: Sir Frederick Bruce presents his compliments to Mr. Seward, and begs to enclose a copy of a resolutionSee Appendix, separate volume. passed by the grand division of the Order of the Sons of Temperance of the province of Canada, wherein they offer congratulations on the successful termination of the civil war in this country, and at the same time express their sympathy with the national bereavement.

postscript.p: Horn William H. Seward, Secretary of State, Washington.
